product.name: Brightroom 13" Decorative Coiled Rope Square Base Tapered Basket Small Cream
product.description: The Brightroom 13" Decorative Coiled Rope Square Base Tapered Basket in cream is a versatile storage solution designed to enhance home organization while adding a touch of style. Featuring a durable coiled rope construction, tapered silhouette, and stable square base, it is perfect for storing blankets, toys, magazines, or bathroom essentials. Compact yet spacious, this basket fits easily into small spaces while complementing modern, rustic, or minimalist décor. Lightweight and portable, it offers both functionality and decorative appeal, making it an essential addition to any home.
